title: My vocabulary
subtitle: Practice and track your vocabulary progress

exercises.title: Keep your progress going
exercises.subtitle: Choose an exercise to continue learning.

wordList.emptyDescription: Your vocabulary list is empty. Start by adding new words!
wordList.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this word?

deleteDialog.title: Delete word?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove "{word}" from your list?

addWord.title: Add word
addWord.notFound: Word not found. Check your spelling.
addWord.error: Could not add word. Please try again.

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.flipHint: Click card or press Enter ↵ to flip
flashcards.swipeHint: Swipe left: I know it · Swipe right: keep practicing
flashcards.swipeHintLearning: Swipe left: Mark as Learned · Swipe right: keep practicing
flashcards.complete: Great job! You've reviewed all your words.
flashcards.noCards: No words to practice. Add some words first.

readySessionComplete.title: All done!
readySessionComplete.description: You've completed {percent}% of the words in your ready to practice list.

quiz.prompt: Choose the word based on the meaning
quiz.notEnoughWords: You need at least 4 words to start a quiz. Add more words or mark some as learned.

wordSearch.hint: Drag horizontally or vertically to select a word
wordSearch.notEnoughWords: You need at least 1 valid word to play. Add words to your list first.
